_meta.description: Taranis Capital Strategic Partners directory — structured reference file that drives partner cards on the main site (who-we-are) and the fund subdomains. Mirrors the taranis-people-data.json pattern.
_meta.generatedBy: Manual seed (2026-06-09) — to be replaced by automated sync once Drive copy is established
notes: MAIN SITE: a partner appears on who-we-are if mainSite.shown is true. The card uses name/url/description.

SUBDOMAIN: a partner appears on a fund if funds.<fund>.shown is true. Each fund entry MAY override brand (display name), url and description; if an override is blank/absent the card falls back to the main-site name/url/description.

DISRUPTS MEDIA SPECIAL CASE: isGroup=true. ONE corporate card ('Disrupts Media') on the main site, but a DIFFERENT brand on each fund subdomain via the per-fund 'brand' override. Per the agreed design, subdomain cards show the brand only with no 'Disrupts Media group' label.
RULE: at most ONE Disrupts Media brand card per subdomain.

partners.name: Disrupts Media
partners.description: Corporate media group behind The Fintech Times, The Biotech Times, The Datatech Times and Disrupts — providing market intelligence, sector coverage and deal-sourcing insight across Taranis Capital's investment themes.

fintech.description: Global fintech media brand reaching 250,000+ subscribers. Provides unparalleled market intelligence, industry analysis, and early access to emerging fintech companies. Our proprietary insights fuel deal sourcing and investment thesis development.

biotech.description: Biotech and life-sciences media title covering therapeutics, biomanufacturing and life-science innovation. Provides sector intelligence and early visibility of emerging companies to inform the Fund's deal sourcing and thesis development.
biotech._note: NEW placement — biotech subdomain does not currently carry a Disrupts brand. Added so every fund carries one brand per the agreed model.

datacentre.description: Data-infrastructure and digital-infrastructure media title covering data centres, connectivity and enterprise technology. Provides market intelligence and company tracking to inform the Fund's investment strategy.
datacentre._note: NEW placement — datacentre subdomain currently has no Strategic Partners section. Brief adds a full section seeded with this brand.

property.description: Technology and innovation media platform tracking emerging companies and disruptive trends. Provides market coverage and company tracking to inform the Fund's investment strategy.
property._note: NEW placement — property subdomain currently has no Strategic Partners section. Brief adds a full section seeded with this brand.

disruptiveTech.description: Technology media platform tracking emerging companies across artificial intelligence, fintech, enterprise software, and media technology. Provides market coverage and company tracking to inform investment strategy.

biotech.description: Health Engineering Life Science Innovation Exchange — a biotech accelerator providing early-stage ventures with mentorship, infrastructure and market access. Helix8 co-designed the Fund's HELIX8 questionnaire, supports CASS scoring, and delivers ongoing localisation support and institutional partnerships to portfolio companies across the Kingdom's biotech ecosystem.

Well-being, Innovation, Sustainability & Entrepreneurship — an international initiative advancing health, sustainable development and enterprise across the Kingdom and wider region. The WISE Initiative supports the Fund's ecosystem, knowledge-transfer and workforce-development objectives for the Kingdom's emerging biotech sector.

The Fund's primary technical and regulatory partner. BOYD Consultants brings deep drug development expertise across cell & gene therapies, biologics, new chemical entities and orphan drugs, supporting MHRA, FDA, EMA and SFDA submissions. BOYD delivers mandatory technical feasibility assessment, CASS framework validation and validation sign-off before any investment is released.

Bio-pharmaceutical technology company decoding nature's molecular chemistry to develop the next generation of plant-based medicines. Phytome's platform combines AI, plant science, natural product chemistry, formulation and sustainable biomanufacturing — a direct strategic fit for the Fund's therapeutics and biomanufacturing localisation strategy. Led by CEO Dr Sebastian Vaughan (also a member of the Fund's Investment Committee).
